'''shangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eastabout|eastabout]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eastabout|eastabout]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shangate|shangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shangatesher|shangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangatesherĂ«m|shangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shangatero|shangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangateshĂ«|shangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangateshĂ«m|shangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishangatero|gokishangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangateshĂ«|gokishangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangateshĂ«m|gokishangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshangankerom|goshangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangankeshĂ«|goshangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangankeshĂ«m|goshangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshangankeya|goshangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shangaterom|shangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangatemu|shangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shangateya|shangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishangaterom|gokishangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangatemu|gokishangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishangateya|gokishangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shangangate|shangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shangangatesher|shangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangatesherĂ«m|shangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shangangatero|shangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangangateshĂ«|shangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangateshĂ«m|shangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishangangatero|gokishangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangangateshĂ«|gokishangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangateshĂ«m|gokishangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshangangankerom|goshangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangangankeshĂ«|goshangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangangankeshĂ«m|goshangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshangangankeya|goshangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shangangaterom|shangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangangatemu|shangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shangangateya|shangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishangangaterom|gokishangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangangatemu|gokishangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishangangateya|gokishangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠte|shĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠtesher|shĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠtero|shĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠngĂŠtero|gokishĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠngĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠngĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠterom|shĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠtemu|shĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠngĂŠteya|shĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠngĂŠterom|gokishĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠngĂŠteya|gokishĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafngafte|shafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafngaftesher|shafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafngaftesherĂ«m|shafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafngaftero|shafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafngafteshĂ«|shafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafngafteshĂ«m|shafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafngaftero|gokishafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafngafteshĂ«|gokishafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafngafteshĂ«m|gokishafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafngafnkerom|goshafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafngafnkeshĂ«|goshafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafngafnkeshĂ«m|goshafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafngafnkeya|goshafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafngafterom|shafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafngaftemu|shafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafngafteya|shafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafngafterom|gokishafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafngaftemu|gokishafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafngafteya|gokishafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
